note: Changed reboot from CliContext-only soft reset to process-level restart. The reboot command now prints shutdown progress, stops VVRP packet input/frame debug services, flushes output, and re-execs the current Python interpreter with the VVRP module so changed code is reloaded cross-platform. Tests patch the exec path to verify argv without replacing the test process.
